nws.name: Overnight
nws.detailedForecast: Patchy smoke. Partly cloudy, with a low around 79. East wind around 2 mph.

nws.name: Thursday
nws.detailedForecast: Patchy smoke before 8am, then patchy smoke and a slight chance of showers and thunderstorms between 8am and 9am, then patchy smoke and a chance of showers and thunderstorms between 9am and 11am, then patchy smoke and a slight chance of showers and thunderstorms between 11am and 4pm. Mostly sunny, with a high near 92. Heat index values as high as 102. Southeast wind 2 to 10 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.
